mapper.select: select count(*) from tb_weigh_info where work_proc_id = #{workProcId}

select b.make_No ,a.item_cd ,dbo.getItemName(a.item_cd) as itemName ,a.proc_order_date ,a.order_qty ,(select storage_name from tb_storage_mst where storage_cd = a.storage_cd) as storage_name ,a.prod_date ,a.storage_cd ,a.memo ,a.etc ,b.po_no ,a.end_yn ,(select CONCAT(CONVERT(varchar(10),work_order_date,23),' - ',seq) from TB_WORK_ORDER_MST where work_order_id = a.work_order_id ) as workOrderDateSeq ,a.proc_status ,b.batch_status ,a.work_proc_id ,a.work_batch_id ,a.proc_cd ,(select area_cd from tb_work_order_mst where work_order_id = a.work_order_id) as area_cd from TB_WORK_ORDER_PROC a inner join TB_WORK_ORDER_BATCH b on b.work_batch_id = a.work_batch_id where a.proc_cd = 'PRC001' and a.work_proc_id = #{workProcId}

select b.item_cd ,dbo.getItemName(b.item_cd) as item_name ,b.phase ,c.appearance ,b.real_content as orderQty
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY b.phase ORDER BY b.order_dist ) AS order_dist from tb_bom_mst a inner join tb_bom_recipe b on b.bom_id = a.bom_id and a.item_cd = #{itemCd} inner join tb_item_detail c on c.item_cd = b.item_cd where a.default_yn = 'Y' order by b.phase, fb.order_dist

select b.item_cd ,dbo.getItemName(b.item_cd) as item_name ,isnull(c.phase, b.phase ) as phase ,(select appearance from tb_item_detail where item_cd = b.item_cd ) as appearance ,b.real_content as orderQty ,c.weigh_qty ,c.bag_weight ,c.test_no ,c.weigh_yn ,c.weigher ,c.confirmer ,c.weigh_id ,c.work_proc_id ,c.work_batch_id ,isnull(c.order_dist, (ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ISNULL(c.phase, c.phase) ORDER BY c.order_dist ) )) as order_dist from tb_bom_mst a inner join tb_bom_recipe b on b.bom_id = a.bom_id and a.item_cd = #{itemCd} inner join tb_weigh_info c on b.item_cd = c.item_cd where c.work_proc_id = #{workProcId} and a.default_yn = 'Y' order by b.phase, c.order_dist
mapper.insert: insert into tb_weigh_info ( work_batch_id, work_proc_id, phase, item_cd, order_qty, weigh_qty, bag_weight, test_no, weigh_yn, weigher, confirmer , order_dist, reg_id, upd_id) values (#{workBatchId}, #{workProcId}, #{phase}, #{itemCd}, #{orderQty}, #{weighQty}, #{bagWeight}, #{testNo}, #{weighYn}, #{weigher}, #{confirmer} , #{orderDist}, #{userId}, #{userId})
mapper.select: select weigh_inv_id ,weigh_id ,storage_cd ,weigh_qty ,item_cd ,lot_no ,test_no from tb_weigh_inv where weigh_id = #{weighId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_weigh_inv (weigh_id, storage_cd, weigh_qty, item_cd, lot_no, test_no, reg_id, upd_id) VALUES (#{weighId}, #{storageCd}, #{weighQty}, #{itemCd}, #{lotNo}, #{testNo}, #{userId}, #{userId})
mapper.select: select a.item_cd ,c.item_type_cd ,c.item_name ,b.lot_no ,b.test_no ,c.expiry_date ,case when b.weigh_qty is null then a.weigh_qty when b.weigh_qty = 0 then a.weigh_qty end as weigh_qty ,b.weigh_inv_id from tb_weigh_info a inner join tb_weigh_inv b on a.weigh_id = b.weigh_id inner join tb_item_mst c on c.item_cd = a.item_cd where a.work_proc_id = #{workProcId}
